notes: Experimental asm scenario is expected to PASS at scenario level for linux/arm64 and linux/riscv64.
Set SIMD_QEMU_ENABLE_BACKEND_ASM=1 to inject per-backend asm defines (NEON/RISCVV gates).
Compiler-ready defines are FAFAFA_SIMD_NEON_ASM_COMPILER_READY and FAFAFA_SIMD_RISCVV_ASM_COMPILER_READY.
Real RVV asm in fafafa.core.simd.riscvv additionally requires FAFAFA_SIMD_RISCVV_ASM_OPCODE_READY.
Current stock riscv64 toolchain still rejects RVV opcodes; keep opcode-ready define unset in default CI lanes.
When backend probe mode is on, unsupported backend-asm toolchains can fallback and keep scenario PASS.
